sacred_boundary: NEVER reveal exact symbol names, geometric forms, activation mantras, or attunement procedures. These are transmitted only from Master to disciple. Blog content must be introductory and educational only.

lineage.founder: Dr. S.K. Saini Ji (Sadguru Swami Satyananda Ji) — rediscovered Lama Fera between 1992-1995 at Nepal-Tibet border through Mahavajrayana Buddhism research. Converted 4,50,000 mantra vibrations into 12 foundational symbols + 7 advanced symbols. Made it accessible to householders.
lineage.guide: Acharya Arunand Ji — based in Nagpur, Maharashtra. Grand Master and spiritual teacher who trained many practitioners across India.
lineage.practitioner: Acharya Mahesh Joshi — certified Master Healer & Trainer, guiding since 2013 from Pune. Blessed by Mahavatar Babaji. Direct disciple in Dr. S.K. Saini Ji lineage. Integrates Lama Fera with MahaVastu, KP Jyotish, Numerology, Samkhya & Six Sigma through VAP methodology.

origin: Ancient Tibetan Buddhist monasteries, ~620 BC. Practiced by Lama monks for 26+ centuries. Guru-shishya parampara transmission. Name: Lama (enlightened master) + Fera (sacred healing rounds/circumambulation).
how_it_works: Non-invasive, contactless energy healing. Practitioner channels Buddha's compassionate healing energy through sacred symbols. Works on physical, etheric, mental and emotional bodies. Balances 7 chakras and 5 elements. Can be done in-person or at distance using photograph. No physical contact required.
system: 12 foundational symbols + 7 advanced symbols = 19 total. Each symbol encodes vibrations of thousands of mantras from Shalvik Mantra Rahasya. Three levels: Level 1 (Healer), Level 2 (Master Teacher), Level 3 (Grandmaster).

physical: element balance (earth, water, fire, air, space)

session_format: Step 1: Consultation (understand concerns). Step 2: Energy assessment. Step 3: Healing session (30-45 min, deeply relaxing). Step 4: Post-session guidance and follow-up. Available: In-person (Pune) and Distance healing (worldwide).
unique_integration: Acharya Mahesh Joshi uniquely combines Lama Fera with MahaVastu (space energy), KP Jyotish (timing), Numerology (vibration), and Samkhya (constitution) — creating a complete ecosystem where person, space, time and destiny are all harmonized together through the VAP framework.
